page: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-32 is an x86_64 architecture server powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 7B13 processor. It features 32 vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core tests placing in the top 25%. Cryptographic performance is also notable, supported by hardware-accelerated AES, VAES, and SHA_NI instruction sets, which align with strong PassMark CPU encryption scores. Multi-core execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations consistently perform within the average tier. However, processing large-scale workloads like LLM inference on a 70B model shows weaker performance, reflecting the lack of dedicated GPU acceleration.

From a resource density perspective, the n2d-highmem-32 offers a cost-effective profile for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The high memory allocation per core makes it highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, caching layers such as Redis, enterprise web serving, and memory-bound data processing tasks.
description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-32 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server configured with 32 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor. Operating with 16 physical cores and 2 threads per core, it delivers 8.0 GB of memory per vCPU. The instance does not include bundled local storage or GPUs. Benchmark data highlights strong single-core CPU performance and robust cryptographic execution, while multi-core operations, memory bandwidth, and database processing perform in the average tier. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound applications that do not require high-speed local NVMe drives. It is well-suited for workloads such as in-memory databases, Redis caching, and memory-intensive data processing.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-32 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and strong single-core and cryptographic benchmark performance.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high memory density for memory-bound enterprise workloads.
